subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-05-05
subcodes.first_line: When we were exiled again from Baghdad, in our company there was a Bahá'í by the name of Mirza Ahmad Kashani. He accompanied Bahá'u'lláh to Constantinople
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Adrianople, @humor; jokes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @stories; anecdotes
